text:
EXPLANATION: The paper exists exactly as cited, published in *Nature Communications* in 2025 (April 6, 2025; DOI: 10.1038/s41467-025-56989-2), with the full 21-author list — including Qingyu Chen, Yan Hu, Xueqing Peng, Qianqian Xie, Qiao Jin, Aidan Gilson, Maxwell B Singer, and all remaining cited authors — confirmed by PubMed, Nature.com, and PMC. The automated checker matched an earlier/incomplete preprint version with a truncated author list and incorrect year (2023), but the final published version matches the cited metadata exactly.
LINK: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-025-56989-2
FOUND_TITLE: Benchmarking large language models for biomedical natural language processing applications and recommendations
FOUND_AUTHORS: Qingyu Chen, Yan Hu, Xueqing Peng, Qianqian Xie, Qiao Jin, Aidan Gilson, Maxwell B. Singer, Xuguang Ai, Po-Ting Lai, Zhizheng Wang, Vipina K. Keloth, Kalpana Raja, Jimin Huang, Huan He, Fongci Lin, Jingcheng Du, Rui Zhang, W. Jim Zheng, Ron A. Adelman, Zhiyong Lu, Hua Xu
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
